pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts

- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
- Reads as: TypeScript definition file with type generics for Env, Input, HandlerResponse, middleware chaining (1-10 handlers)
- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/*.ts (single file export), src/hono (Hono class import)
- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono app instances with custom initialization and handler arrays. Exposes createApp, createMiddleware, and createHandlers methods with up to 10 handler overloading.

## src/helper/route/index.ts

- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Route inspection utilities using Context and RouterRoute types with path splitting utilities
- Neighbor files: src/utils/url (getPattern, splitRoutingPath), src/context (Context type)
- Safe summary: Helper to get matched routes and path information from handler context. Supports indexed access for root hierarchy. Uses WeakMap for caching basePath computations.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, createWSMessageEvent
- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade helper with event listener types, context wrapper, and message event factory
- Neighbor files: src/context (Context type), src/types (MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse)
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade middleware for Hono. Defines event handlers (onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError) and provides WSContext for bidirectional messaging. Supports async event creation function pattern.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts

- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
- Reads as: Cookie utility functions using parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned from src/utils/cookie
- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie (parse, serialize), src/context (Context type)
- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading, writing, and deleting cookies with signed variants. Supports __Secure- and __Host- prefix options per RFC standards. Provides generateCookie/generateSignedCookie factory functions.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts

- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Testing client factory using hc from client module with customFetch for Hono request interception
- Neighbor files: src/client (hc), src/types (Schema, ExecutionContext, Hono)
- Safe summary: Creates test client instance with custom request handler that proxies to Hono app.request. Supports Env bindings and execution context options.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts

- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
- Reads as: Runtime detection helper with platform-specific environment variable access for node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light
- Neighbor files: src/context (Context type)
- Safe summary: Detects and accesses runtime-specific environment variables. Supports 7 runtime types (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light, other). Uses user-agent detection for most platforms.

## src/helper/css/index.ts

- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS helper with class name generation, style management, keyframes, and view transition support
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html (raw), src/jsx/dom/css (createCssJsxDomObjects), src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: Experimental CSS helper providing server-side and client-side rendering. Exposes css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition/Style with hash-based class naming and optional custom slug functions.

## src/helper/css/common.ts

- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, toHash, minify, buildStyleString
- Reads as: Shared CSS utility functions with hash generation, minification, and class name building
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts (importer), src/helper/css/common.ts (self)
- Safe summary: Common CSS processing utilities. Handles template string parsing, CSS minification, hash-based class naming, and keyframe validation. Exposes rawCssString for escaped strings.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts

- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Proxy fetch wrapper with hop-by-hop header stripping and RFC 9110 compliance options
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception (HTTPException), src/utils/headers (RequestHeader)
- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests. Strips hop-by-hop headers automatically. Optional strict Connection header processing mode. Handles customFetch injection for testing.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts

- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Development utilities for displaying registered routes and handler names with optional colorization
- Neighbor files: src/utils/color (getColorEnabled), src/utils/handler (findTargetHandler, isMiddleware)
- Safe summary: Dev helpers to inspect and display app routes. Colorized console output. Filters middleware based on verbose flag. Also extracts router name from app.

## src/helper/html/index.ts

- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: HTML string building with escapeToBuffer, raw helper, and callback resolution
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html (escapeToBuffer, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString, raw)
- Safe summary: Simple HTML helper for template string rendering. Supports escaped values, numbers, and async callback functions. Exports raw passthrough function.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext
- Reads as: SSG helper re-export from ssg, middleware.ts, and plugins.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helper. Exports toSSG function and middleware for static-route-only handlers. Provides plugins for hooks before request, after response, after generate.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts

- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, generateFilePath, isSSGContext
- Reads as: Core SSG logic with concurrency pool, file path generation, and route content fetching
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts (self), src/client/utils (replaceUrlParam), src/utils/concurrent (createPool), src/utils/mime (getExtension), src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Safe summary: SSG implementation using worker pool for concurrent route fetching. Supports hooks, plugins, and custom extension maps. Default output dir is ./static. Handles text and binary content types.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts

- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities with Windows-compatible path handling and route filtering
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts (importer), src/helper/ssg/utils.ts (self), src/router (METHOD_NAME_ALL), src/utils/handler (findTargetHandler)
- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path normalization and route filtering. Excludes dynamic routes (params or wildcards). Prevents path traversal outside output directory.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts

- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSGParams
- Reads as: SSG middleware for controlling static generation and dynamic route parameters
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts (importer), src/helper/ssg/utils.ts (isDynamicRoute)
- Safe summary: Middleware to control SSG execution. ssgParams adds parameters to request. disableSSG/onlySSG guard helpers. Uses header key x-hono-disable-ssg for dynamic route exclusion.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Streaming helper exports from stream, sse, and text modules
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming helpers re-exporting core streaming APIs. Provides generic stream, SSE, and text-streaming variants for large response streaming.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
- Reads as: Generic streaming API with TransformStream, error handling, and Bun version compatibility
- Neighbor files: src/utils/stream (StreamingApi), src/helper/streaming/utils.ts (isOldBunVersion)
- Safe summary: Core streaming function returning Response with stream body. Handles Bun v1.1.27 bug with cancel() not called on aborted requests. Context stash for cleanup.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts

- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage, run
- Reads as: SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming with message format, event/id/retry fields
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts (StreamingApi), src/utils/html (resolveCallback), src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper for real-time event pushes. Formats messages as data: events with optional event, id, retry fields. Sets Transfer-Encoding: chunked and text/event-stream content type.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts

- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Plain text streaming wrapper using base stream function with text headers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts (stream)
- Safe summary: Text-only streaming variant. Sets Content-Type to text/plain and X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff headers. Uses base stream implementation.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Accept header parser delegating to accepts.ts implementation
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Safe summary: Helper to match accept headers against supported types with fallback to default. Exports single accepts function.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts

- Main exports or names: accepts, parseAccept, defaultMatch, Accept, acceptsOptions, acceptsConfig
- Reads as: Accept header parsing and matching with q-value sorting and custom match functions
- Neighbor files: src/utils/accept (parseAccept), src/utils/headers (AcceptHeader)
- Safe summary: Accept header matching using q-values. Supports custom match function for complex logic. Returns best match or default fallback. Sorts by quality factor (q) descending.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts

- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: Type definitions re-exporting from types.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Type-only export for connection info types. Provides ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, and GetConnInfo types.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Connection information types with remote address, port, transport protocol, and IPv4/IPv6 address type
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts (importer), src/context (Context type)
- Safe summary: Type definitions for HTTP connection info. Defines ConnInfo with remote NetAddrInfo containing address, port, transport. Supports IPv4/IPv6 classification.

## Simple Index

- [src/helper/route/index.ts](src/helper/route/index.ts)
- [src/helper/websocket/index.ts](src/helper/websocket/index.ts)

- [src/helper/ssg/index.ts](src/helper/ssg/index.ts)
- [src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts](src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts)
